query:
so.. I'm running scripts/uni-watch.sh while the feature isin development.  I'm wanting to see as much as I can about what's getting silently injected (to validate if it has value)  Here's waht I'm seeing right now... does this mean there's nothing getting injected?? specifically interested in subagent events: Watermarks — query_id:2975  log_id:1639  obs_id:110896
Polling every 2s. Ctrl-C to stop.

entries.title: ADR-002: Explicit NULL Topic and Feature Cycle Handling (crt-018)
Silent data orphaning: hardcoded None in hook pipeline breaks entire feedback loop
ADR-001 crt-025: Phase Snapshot at Enqueue Time for FeatureEntry Analytics Path
ADR-003 col-025: SubagentStart Injection Routes to IndexBriefingService When Goal Is Present
UDS Observation Log: operator-togglable debug visibility via unimatrix_server::obs target
